test-method.name: testFlightBookingFlowFromExcel
test-method.description: Data-driven flight booking from login through payment screen

param.value: {Email=test1@example.com, ExpectedResult=Pass, Username=admin@example.com, ToCity=Mumbai, Travellers=1, PassengerName=Test User One, FromCity=Delhi, Mobile=9876543210, Password=Admin@123, DepartDate=2026-06-15}

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (fda4546a23c840621b3d7718b0b08e68)] -> css selector: #payment-screen h1, h1] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.17' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\shikh\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:56046}, goog:processID: 8040, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56046/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: fda4546a23c840621b3d7718b0b08e68

test-method.name: testFlightBookingFlowFromExcel
test-method.description: Data-driven flight booking from login through payment screen

param.value: {Email=test2@example.com, ExpectedResult=Pass, Username=admin@example.com, ToCity=Goa, Travellers=2, PassengerName=Test User Two, FromCity=Bangalore, Mobile=9123456780, Password=Admin@123, DepartDate=2026-07-01}

test-method.name: testFlightBookingFlowFromExcel
test-method.description: Data-driven flight booking from login through payment screen

param.value: {Email=bad@example.com, ExpectedResult=Fail, Username=bad@example.com, ToCity=Mumbai, Travellers=1, PassengerName=N/A, FromCity=Delhi, Mobile=0000000000, Password=wrongpass, DepartDate=skip}
